overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a rain-soaked neon-lit city street. The player character walks past towering digital billboards including a prominent 'WET DREAM' advertisement, moves under an elevated highway overpass, and crosses a busy intersection with other pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial street with massive digital billboards

events.description: begins at a wet city crosswalk surrounded by towering neon advertisements
looks upward while walking to view the massive overhead billboards

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the rain-slicked street surrounded by glowing neon signage and towering buildings

entered.detail: massive vertical digital billboard displaying 'WET DREAM' in pink neon text with a woman's face
building facade covered with bright yellow and white neon signage
yellow striped pedestrian crossing lines on the wet asphalt
tall building with vertical red banners featuring white Japanese text

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-soaked cyberpunk city street at night, with the player walking forward through a canyon of towering buildings covered in massive glowing digital billboards. The iconic 'WET DREAM' billboard dominates the center view while neon reflections shimmer on the wet pavement. The street is relatively empty with only a few distant pedestrians visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway beneath elevated highway overpass

events.description: moves under the elevated highway overpass structure
passes by a crashed black vehicle partially blocking the sidewalk view

agents.ego_description: turning to follow the street curvature while walking beneath the overpass structure

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking along the sidewalk near the crashed vehicle

entered.detail: massive elevated highway or monorail track running overhead with green metallic supports
damaged black luxury car crashed against the sidewalk barrier with debris scattered around
black metal pedestrian railing along the edge of the walkway

segments.scene_description: The player moves beneath a massive elevated highway overpass, the environment becoming more enclosed with green metal structures overhead. A crashed black vehicle sits on the right sidewalk. The 'WET DREAM' billboard remains visible but shifts to the left as the player turns along the curved street path.

scene_state.functional_zone: street intersection with pedestrian crossing and waiting crowd

events.description: approaches crosswalk with red pedestrian signal illuminated
stops at the crosswalk to wait with other pedestrians

agents.ego_description: waiting at the crosswalk intersection with a group of pedestrians for the signal to change

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with bright blue hair wearing a brown coat waiting to cross
pedestrian in black jacket and shorts standing at the crosswalk signal

entered.detail: pedestrian signal showing red illuminated walking figure indicating do not cross
wide intersection with yellow striped crosswalk lines and neon reflections
building facade illuminated with pink and purple neon lights

segments.scene_description: The player emerges from under the overpass into a more open intersection area, approaching a crosswalk where several pedestrians are waiting. The pedestrian signal shows red. The crowd density increases with people standing on the sidewalk, including a notable figure with blue hair. The wet pavement reflects the surrounding pink and purple neon lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection crossing with multiple pedestrians

events.description: pedestrian signal changes to green, begins crossing the street with the crowd
continues walking across the wide intersection toward the opposite sidewalk

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide street with a group of pedestrians while surrounded by towering neon city lights

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in brown coat walking ahead across the crosswalk

entered.detail: destination sidewalk on the far side of the intersection with building entrances
cluster of colorful neon signs and billboards visible down the street

segments.scene_description: The player crosses the wide wet intersection with a crowd of pedestrians, moving from one side of the neon-lit street to the other. The pedestrian signal changes to green, and the group moves together across the yellow-striped crosswalk. The camera captures the expansive view of the cyberpunk cityscape with distant neon signs and towering skyscrapers as the crossing continues toward the opposite sidewalk.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a rain-soaked cyberpunk district, moving from a narrow canyon of digital billboards into a crowded city intersection. It begins by walking forward beneath towering skyscrapers where the glowing 'WET DREAM' advertisement dominates the view and neon lights shimmer on the wet pavement. As the camera advances, the environment becomes more enclosed under the green metal structures of a massive elevated highway overpass, passing a crashed black vehicle on the sidewalk. The scene then opens up as the player emerges from the overpass toward a bustling crosswalk, where the lighting shifts to vibrant pink and purple reflections among a gathering crowd of pedestrians. Finally, the camera moves across the yellow-striped intersection as the signal turns green, expanding the view to reveal a wide cityscape of distant neon signs and skyscrapers.
